title: Sister Sleuth and the Silver Blaze

q.en: What is Silver Blaze in the story?
q.zh: 在故事中，“银焰”（Silver Blaze）是什么？

options.en: A champion racehorse and the favorite to win the Wessex Cup
options.zh: 一匹冠军赛马，也是韦塞克斯杯夺冠热门

options.en: A book of magic written by The Great Gallardo
options.zh: 伟大的加拉尔多写的一本魔法书

explain.en: Silver Blaze is Colonel Ross's champion horse and the first favorite in the Wessex Cup race, which disappears from King's Pyland stables.
explain.zh: 银焰是罗斯上校的冠军马，也是韦塞克斯杯赛的夺冠热门，在金·派兰德马厩失踪了。

q.en: What is the name of Miguel's younger sister who loves horses?
q.zh: 米格尔那位爱马的妹妹叫什么名字？

explain.en: Miguel's seven-year-old sister is Teresa, who is obsessed with her toy horses.
explain.zh: 米格尔七岁的妹妹是特雷莎，她痴迷于自己的玩具马。

q.en: Who is The Great Gallardo in Miguel's family?
q.zh: 伟大的加拉尔多是米格尔家的什么人？

options.zh: 米格尔的曾祖父，一位魔术师

explain.en: The Great Gallardo was Miguel's great-grandfather, a magician who left a chest of magical books in the loft.
explain.zh: 伟大的加拉尔多是米格尔的曾祖父，一位魔术师，他在阁楼里留下了一箱魔法书。

q.en: Which book transports Miguel into the Sherlock Holmes mystery?
q.zh: 哪本书把米格尔带进了福尔摩斯的谜案中？

options.en: A diary kept by Colonel Ross

explain.en: Miguel finds The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes in the chest, and reading page 185 pulls him into 'The Adventure of the Silver Blaze.'
explain.zh: 米格尔在箱子里发现了《福尔摩斯回忆录》，读到第185页时他被带入了《银焰案》。

q.en: On what page does the magic finally send Miguel into the story?
q.zh: 魔法究竟在第几页把米格尔送进了故事里？

explain.en: The book opens to page 185, 'The Adventure of the Silver Blaze,' and that is when the words swirl and Miguel is transported.
explain.zh: 书翻到了第185页《银焰案》，就在那时文字旋转、米格尔被传送了进去。

q.en: Why did the owner of Mapleton Stables hide Silver Blaze?
q.zh: 梅普尔顿马厩的主人为什么要藏起银焰？

options.en: To keep him out of the race so his own horse could win
options.zh: 为了让他退出比赛，好让自己的马获胜

options.en: Because the horse had become sick
To sell him to the Gypsies for money
options.zh: 为了把他卖给吉普赛人换钱

options.en: Because he was afraid of Sherlock Holmes

explain.en: Teresa explains that the owner of the horse favored second in the race found Silver Blaze and disguised him to keep him out of the Wessex Cup.
explain.zh: 特雷莎解释道，那匹在比赛中屈居亚军的马的主人发现了银焰并伪装他，让他无法参加韦塞克斯杯。

q.en: Who discovers the horse tracks hidden under the ferns on the moor?
q.zh: 是谁在荒原蕨丛下发现了马蹄印？

explain.en: Teresa finds the horse tracks plainly outlined in the soft earth under some ferns, and the horseshoe matches them.
explain.zh: 特雷莎在蕨丛下的软泥里清楚发现了马蹄印，并与马蹄铁完全吻合。

q.en: What does the story suggest about using imagination?
q.zh: 这个故事对“发挥想象力”表达了什么看法？

options.en: It helps detectives notice clues others miss
options.zh: 它能帮助侦探注意到别人忽略的线索

options.en: It is a weakness that investigators should avoid
options.zh: 它是调查者应当避免的弱点

options.en: Only grown-ups are capable of it
options.zh: 只有成年人才拥有想象力

options.en: It caused Silver Blaze to disappear

explain.en: Holmes and Teresa both use imagination to picture the horse's path, showing that imagination helps solve mysteries.
explain.zh: 福尔摩斯和特雷莎都靠想象力去推测马的踪迹，说明想象力有助于破案。

q.en: What object does Holmes toss to Miguel to compare with the tracks in the mud?
q.zh: 福尔摩斯扔给米格尔、用来比对泥地里蹄印的是什么？

explain.en: Holmes tosses Miguel the horseshoe he used to compare to the tracks, and later Teresa's find matches it perfectly.
explain.zh: 福尔摩斯把用来比对蹄印的马蹄铁扔给米格尔，后来特雷莎的发现与它完全吻合。

q.en: According to Miguel's theory, why does the magic work only on this particular day?
q.zh: 按照米格尔的推测，为什么魔法偏偏只在今天生效？

options.en: Because it is a full moon

options.zh: 因为特雷莎提前读了后面

options.en: Because it is the 185th day of the year
options.zh: 因为今天是一年中的第185天

explain.en: Miguel checks the calendar and sees it is the 185th day of the year, matching the magic page 185.
explain.zh: 米格尔查看日历，发现今天是一年中的第185天，正好对应魔法生效的第185页。

prompt.en: If you discovered a book that could magically send you into any story, which adventure would you choose and what clues would you look for?
prompt.zh: 如果你发现了一本能把你神奇地带进任何故事的书，你会选择哪段冒险？你又会去寻找哪些线索？

en: Think about a book or movie you love and the problem its characters face.
Consider what details or clues would help you solve that problem.
zh: 想一想你喜爱的一本书或一部电影，以及书中角色面临的难题。
考虑哪些细节或线索能帮你解决那个难题。
